title: Approver returns a PO instead of approving — sends back to creator for fix
user_persona: Approver who finds an issue and bounces the PO back

conversation.user: I need to review PO-2026-560 for approval.
The unit price on line 1 looks wrong — too high vs market. Return this PO with that comment.

slots_extracted.return_reason: unit price on line 1 above market rate

bot_must: report PO returned to creator (status Returned or Draft depending on config)
bot_must_not: fire POAPPMAINSBT — user said return, not approve

evaluation_metrics.return_vs_approve: POAPPENTTRN3 not POAPPMAINSBT — bot must distinguish return from approve
evaluation_metrics.reason_captured: return_reason extracted as note for creator
